REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciaran O'Sullivan for petitioner.

Mr. O'Sullivan requested six months stating that the inventory and appraisal has been filed, that he and the executor are now communicating and that there is an issue with the decedent's back taxes needing to be paid. The Report on Status of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. Status on close of estate is set for October 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-27-2021 is admitted to probate. Gardner Williams Mein is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
